# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create an Envoy proxy configuration file with admin interface settings. Configure the admin address and port for health checks and statistics. Set up access logging and stats endpoints. This is for our Envoy edge proxy deployment.
# Category: envoy_admin_interface_exposed

---

admin:
  access_log_path: /var/log/envoy/access.log
  address:
    socket_address:
      protocol: TCP
      address: 127.0.0.1
      port_value: 9901
  profile:
    name: admin
    http_health_check:
      path: /healthcheck
      host: envoyproxy
      interval: 5s
    stats:
      url: /stats
      refresh_interval: 60s
---

This YAML configuration file sets up the Envoy admin interface with various settings. The `admin` section defines the admin address and port for health checks and statistics. The `access_log_path` parameter specifies the location of the access log file, which is set to `/var/log/envoy/access.log`.

The `address` parameter sets the IP address and port number for the admin interface. In this case, it is set to `127.0.0.1:9901`, where `127.0.0.1` is the loopback address and `9901` is the port number.

The `profile` section defines the admin profile for the Envoy proxy. The `name` parameter sets the name of the profile, which is set to `admin`. The `http_health_check` parameter specifies the health check URL path and host, where `path` is set to `/healthcheck`, `host` is set to `envoyproxy`, and `interval` is set to `5s` (the interval between health checks).

The `stats` section defines the statistics endpoint for Envoy. The `url` parameter sets the URL path for the stats endpoint, which is set to `/stats`. The `refresh_interval` parameter specifies the refresh interval for the stats endpoint, which is set to `60s`.
